creator: alexanderchuranov@gmail.com
text:
Baptiste,

Thank you for your attention to Boost.
I am currently testing my patch to update boost ports.

Your patch is mostly the same, however there are differences. I've
focused to getting an update as soon as possible to minimize the
version lag. I am planning to continue working on Boost ports after
that. That's why I am not modifying the way Boost is installed,
keeping the process as it was for stability.

As for the exp-run, it would be great, since the hardware requirements
always were an obstacle in updating Boost. Currently I have access to
a reasonably fast server, but even with that it takes 50 hours to
rebuild all directly dependent packages for a single combination of
FreeBSD version and machine architecture. I am not sure that I will be
able to test patch correctness for all supported OS versions and
machine types - which was the reason update to 1.46 was declined in
the first place.

My patch is located at
http://alexanderchuranov.com/boost-port/boost-145-to-148-v03.diff

Review and help with testing is always welcomed.

Alexander Churanov,
maintainer of devel/boost-*
